prompt: trying to figure out which kinds of compiler warnings our build is emitting — want a count grouped by warning type so we know what to prioritize fixing. The build bundle is at `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`

assertions.name: groups-by-warning-type
assertions.description: Output presents warnings grouped by type with explicit counts per type.

assertions.name: uses-peekie-warnings
assertions.description: Output uses `peekie warnings`. Correctly flags the Xcode #warning mis-tag if relevant.

assertions.name: actionable-prioritization-context
assertions.description: Output gives prioritization-actionable interpretation; separates real warnings from developer markers.
